title: spiesia oxyphylla
intro: Spiesia oxyphylla, also known as Oxeye Daisy or Pyrethrum, is a perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Spiesia oxyphylla include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to repel insects due to its pyrethrin content. Spiesia oxyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its flowers can be used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
